history.text: Portuguese explorers recorded the islands for European navigation.
Ngazidja, Ndzuwani, Mwali under French rule placed the territory under outside administration.
Protectorate of the Comoros placed the territory under outside administration.
Territory under French Madagascar placed the territory under a larger colonial administration.
Comoros became an overseas territory within a larger imperial system.
State of Comoros appears in Comoros' historical record.
Comoros became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Federal Islamic Republic of Comoros introduced a new form of state rule.
